subject: [XTESTING] Use Python 3.11 images as a base of xtesting images
commit_message:
[XTESTING] Use Python 3.11 images as a base of xtesting images

We needs 3.11 version which is not installed on previous base

Issue-ID: INT-2222
Signed-off-by: Michal Jagiello <michal.jagiello@t-mobile.pl>
Change-Id: I60418e8b634a33f1bebf2425032032718bbbdd2a

entries.message:

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/234/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/234/ )
